---
id: update
title: "UpdateRealtimeASRTask"
description: "Update ASR task."
api: 
info_path: extended_services/cloud-realtime-asr/en/server/api-reference/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>UpdateRealtimeASRTask</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


Update ASR task.
## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> Interface prototype parameter\n>\n> https://cloud-realtime-asr-api.zegotech.cn?Action=UpdateRealtimeASRTask\n","required":true,"allowEmptyValue":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["UpdateRealtimeASRTask"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Application ID, assigned by ZEGOCLOUD. Get it from the [ZEGOCLOUD Admin Console](https://console.zegocloud.com/).","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. 16-bit hexadecimal random string (hex encoding of 8 bytes of random number). For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Current Unix timestamp, in seconds. For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>, maximum allowed deviation of 10 minutes.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Signature version number.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Signature, used to verify the legitimacy of the request. Please refer to [Signature Mechanism](/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism) to generate.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime request"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json-schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details mime"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"TaskId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier of the task.","example":"1920370518175780864"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>StreamList</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>List of streams to recognize. If not specified, all streams will be recognized by default. This will override the previous stream list.</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"StreamId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Stream ID to be recognized."}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ASR</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>ASR parameters</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Vendor"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`Tencent`, `AliyunParaformer`, `AliyunGummy`, `Microsoft`]"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"ASR vendor. Refer to [Configure ASR](/cloud-realtime-asr/configuring-asr) parameter description. If you need Alibaba, Microsoft recognition vendors, please contact ZEGOCLOUD business support to enable.","enum":["Tencent","AliyunParaformer","AliyunGummy","Microsoft"],"default":"Tencent","example":"Tencent"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Params"} required={false} schemaName={"object"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"object","description":"Vendor parameters. For specific usage, refer to the Params parameter description in [Configure ASR](/cloud-realtime-asr/configuring-asr).","example":{"engine_model_type":"16k_zh","hotword_list":"zego|10"}}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"VADSilenceSegmentation"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `>= 200` and `<= 2000`"} schema={{"type":"number","description":"Used to set how many milliseconds after the user stops speaking, two sentences will no longer be considered as one.\nUnit is ms, range [200, 2000], default is 500.\nFor detailed explanation, refer to [Configure ASR - Speech Segmentation Control](/cloud-realtime-asr/configuring-asr#speech-segmentation-control).\n","minimum":200,"maximum":2000,"default":500,"example":500}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"HotWord"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","deprecated":true,"description":"This parameter is deprecated. Please set it through Params vendor parameters."}}></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"EnableTranslation"} required={false} schemaName={"boolean"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether to enable translation."}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>Translation</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>Translation LLM configuration item</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Vendor"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`DoubaoSeedTranslation`, `QwenMT`]"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"LLM vendor to call.","enum":["DoubaoSeedTranslation","QwenMT"],"example":"DoubaoSeedTranslation"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SourceLanguage"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Source language","example":"zh"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"TargetLanguage"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Target language","example":"en"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>LLM</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span><span className={"openapi-schema__divider"}></span><span className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>LLM parameters for translation.</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Url"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"LLM interface address to call. Different for different Vendors:\n- When Vendor is DoubaoSeedTranslation: https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3/responses\n- When Vendor is QwenMT: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions\n","example":"https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3/responses"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"ApiKey"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"The parameter used for authentication by the LLM service provider.","example":""}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Model"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"The LLM model name to call, required. Different vendors support different models.","example":"doubao-seed-translation-250915"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Params"} required={false} schemaName={"object"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"object","description":"LLM or application platform request parameters, optional.<br>\n- For OpenAI protocol, you can configure parameters such as max_tokens, temperature, stream, etc.<br>\n- For other application platforms, you can fill in the parameters supported by the platform.","example":{}}}></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>Task updated successfully</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"integer"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","description":"Return code. 0 indicates success, other values indicate failure. For details, please refer to [Return Codes](/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/return-codes).","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Request result description","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Request ID","example":"6710396424239903698"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"6710396424239903698\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example"} value={"Example"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"6710396424239903698\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
